About Me

Rahaf Muwaed

AI and Data Science graduate from the University of Prince Mugrin. Skilled in transforming unstructured data into structured, actionable insights using LLMs, LangChain, and RAG architectures. Experienced in developing intelligent systems, integrating APIs, and building scalable data pipelines.

Strong background in data analysis, machine learning, and AI agents, with practical exposure to robotics data systems and computer vision applications.

Featured Projects

Data science, AI, and NLP projects solving real-world problems.

🎓 Capstone Project · 2024–2025
⭐ Capstone · University of Prince Mugrin
SADA
Smart Arabic Dialects Agent — سدا
An end-to-end AI system designed to support pilgrims and tourists from North Africa, bridging the gap between Maghrebi Arabic dialects and Modern Standard Arabic for seamless access to services in Saudi Arabia.
🌐Dialect-to-MSA Translation in real time (Maghrebi Arabic focus)
🗣️Voice input with real-time dialect translation using ASR
🧠NER model fine-tuned on 40K+ samples to extract booking details
🔎Agentic RAG for grounded, reliable, context-aware responses
🏨Hotel Booking Agent integrated with Amadeus API
🧳Trip Planning Agent for personalized travel plans by city & duration
